underlying_goal: Complete UI/UX redesign of an Electron app to match an 'airi' immersive style, fix pet mode UX issues, and audit backend vs frontend feature parity for settings
brief_summary: User requested a full UI/UX redesign (5 phases, 35 files), pet mode UX fixes, and a backend-frontend feature parity audit; the redesign and pet mode were completed and committed successfully (721/721 tests passing), while the audit plan was interrupted before delivery.
